title: Emergency Response Funding
description: This bill supplements or reduces appropriations otherwise provided for the support and operation of state government for the fiscal year beginning July 1, 2022 and ending June 30, 2023 and for the fiscal year beginning July 1, 2023 and ending June 30, 2024.

title: Restricted Persons Amendments
description: This bill amends provisions concerning dangerous weapons restrictions for certain persons.

title: Firefighter Death Benefit Amendments
description: This bill modifies the death benefit for certain firefighters under the Firefighters' Retirement Act.

title: Joint Resolution Extending Emergency Powers for Flood Mitigation and Infrastructure Rehabilitation
description: This resolution extends the state of emergency declared by the Governor to address flood risks throughout the state.
